name: jambavan
description: Jambavan — a Model Context Protocol server that gives any coding model a live code map, durable memory, an inferred code graph, prompt compression, and guarded file/shell tools.

plugins.name: jambavan
plugins.description: MCP server: AST-aware code index, token-budgeted context, durable memory, code graph, prompt compression, and guarded tools. Read-only by default; write/shell tools are opt-in.
